---
description: "Generate a personalized daily study plan with coding practice, theory, and system design tasks based on current progress."
---

Review my current study progress by checking:
1. The todo list for any in-progress items
2. Progress files in the workspace (e.g., `algorithms/progress.md`, `system-design/progress.md`, etc.)
3. Recently modified files to understand what I've been working on

Based on my current state, generate today's study plan:

## Daily Study Plan

### 1. Theory Block (30 min)
- Pick the next uncovered topic from my current study phase
- Provide a brief lesson or point me to the right skill/module
- Include one key concept to master today

### 2. Coding Practice (45 min)
- One coding problem aligned with what I'm currently studying
- Include difficulty level (Easy/Medium/Hard)
- Specify the pattern/technique it tests
- Link to the problem if on LeetCode/HackerRank

### 3. System Design / Architecture (30 min)
- One concept or mini-design exercise
- Could be: component deep dive, comparison exercise, or a 15-min design sketch

### 4. Review & Reflect (15 min)
- One concept from 3+ days ago to revisit (spaced repetition)
- One quick-check question to test retention

Format the plan as a clear checklist I can work through.
